marketing.hero_alignment: Centered text with wide visual impact

buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg px-6 py-3

cards.dashboard: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm
cards.pricing: flex flex-col rounded-3xl border border-border bg-card p-8 shadow-lg hover:border-primary/50 transition-all relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

glassmorphism.nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50

feature_finance.description: Close up numbers for Bookkeeping/Data features

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Dark Mode is DEFAULT. Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the root/html element or handled via theme provider.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (h1-h3) and 'Inter' for body text.
For the Landing Page: Use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy overlay (bg-black/80) so text pops. Use 'text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white to-white/50' for the main H1.
For the Dashboard: Use a fixed sidebar layout. The main content area should be 'bg-background' or slightly lighter 'bg-zinc-950/50'. Cards should be distinct.
Pricing Page: Emphasize the 'Premium' plan ($29.99) with a border-primary and a 'Most Popular' badge.
Charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts wrapper). Style them with the primary color (#6366f1) and success color (#10b981).
Forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Ensure inputs have 'bg-input/50' and 'focus:ring-primary'.
Icons: Use Lucide-React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for a refined look.
Motion: Add 'framer-motion' for simple entrance animations (fade-in-up) on the landing page elements.
Tailwind Config: You MUST update the tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (zinc-based structure) and fonts.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical bento grids for features.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
